0.text: Increased density due to scarring in the posterior segment of the right upper lobe

1.text: Paracicatricial bronchiectatic changes in the posterior segment of the right upper lobe

2.text: Volume loss and parenchymal distortion in the posterior segment of the right upper lobe

3.text: Emphysematous changes in the upper lobes of both lungs

4.text: Increased density compatible with pleuroparenchymal contour irregularities in the apices of both lungs

5.text: Widespread subsegmental atelectasis areas in the lower lobes of both lungs
